description: VERIFIED LIVE: Twitch via content-script DOM extraction (Twitch's GraphQL API is integrity-signed). Twitch renders live-channel cards in stable [data-a-target] markup — no login needed for the public directory — so these tools read them straight from the DOM of your open Twitch tab. Navigate the tab to a directory (/directory/all, /directory/category/<game>, or your /directory/following) and let it load, then call the tool. Tested live by Claude Code on /directory/all: 30 live channels with stream title, channel url, category and viewer count extracted correctly.

tools.name: twitch_directory
tools.description: Live channels on the current Twitch DIRECTORY page (/directory/all, a category /directory/category/<game>, or your logged-in /directory/following). Navigate the tab there and let it load first. Returns each live channel's stream title, channel url, category and viewer count. VERIFIED (30 channels).
